work_name: The Gateless Barrier — 1632 NDL Woodblock Reading Edition
work_name_zh: 無門關（一六三二年和刻本，国立国会図書館本・編訂讀本）
author: 無門慧開 (Wumen Huikai, 1183–1260)
edition_kind_note: Editorial reading edition rebuilt from the 1632 NDL Japanese woodblock witness of Wumenguan. NOT a diplomatic transcript and NOT a full critical edition. The base text is the Wikimedia-Commons-hosted NDL12865429 scan (PD-old); OCR comparison (tesseract, RapidOCR, PaddleOCR, selective EasyOCR) plus image adjudication were used to produce a reading text, with selective corroboration from two additional PD witnesses: the Waseda 1752 Mumonkan copy via Commons (WUL-bunko31_e1102) and the NDL Wumen-Huikai Recorded Sayings (NDL2537788, rights-memo still incomplete in the local source ledger — cited only as a tertiary corroborant for Huikai's voice, not as a primary authority). Several witness-backed rough readings are intentionally retained without silent normalization: (1) 說道有門，無阿師分 in the prefatory material; (2) 請續一向 in case 20; (3) the case 31 無門曰 wording. Case 49 (第四十九則語) is placed in a div type="appendix" outside the core 48-case spine because it is late-appended material by Anwan. Apparatus is deliberately omitted from v1; it can be added later as a div type="apparatus" from the separate witness notes in C:\woodblocks\Transcriptions\Wumenguan_1632_NDL_Commons\architect\WUMENGUAN_1632.md and THREE_WITNESS_VERIFICATION.md. Distinct from ws.gateless-barrier (Wikisource-derived, CC BY-SA 4.0) — this file uses a "wm32.*" line-ID namespace so the two Wumenguans in the corpus cannot cross-pollinate through TM or search indices.
license_basis: Underlying work is PD-old (author died 1260). Base and secondary witnesses are public-domain Japanese woodblock imprints with mechanical scans hosted on Wikimedia Commons. The editorial reading-edition layer (segmentation, line-ID scheme, case ordering decisions, small editorial repairs) is the editor's own creative work and is dedicated to the public domain under CC0 1.0 Universal — no attribution, no share-alike, no obligations of any kind.

witnesses_consulted.label: NDL 12865429 無門關 1卷 (Japan, 1632 woodblock imprint)
witnesses_consulted.rights: PD-old (mechanical reproduction of a public-domain Japanese woodblock imprint; hosted on Wikimedia Commons)
witnesses_consulted.rights_basis_text: Wikimedia Commons describes the file as a mechanical reproduction of a public-domain original, and the 1632 woodblock imprint is in the public domain in Japan and every other jurisdiction relevant to OpenZenTexts distribution. The local source ledger at C:\woodblocks\SOURCES.md entry §1 records confidence as high.

witnesses_consulted.label: Waseda University Library bunko31 e1102 無門關 1卷 (Japan, 1752 woodblock imprint)
witnesses_consulted.host: Wikimedia Commons (mirrored from Waseda University Library)
witnesses_consulted.rights: PD-old (mechanical reproduction of a public-domain Japanese woodblock imprint; hosted on Wikimedia Commons)
witnesses_consulted.rights_basis_text: Wikimedia Commons describes the file as a public-domain mechanical reproduction; SOURCES.md §3 marks confidence as medium-high (Commons-hosted is the posture we rely on rather than Waseda's own site terms).
witnesses_consulted.role_in_production: secondary cross-check — used for image adjudication where the 1632 base witness is weak

witnesses_consulted.label: NDL 2537788 無門慧開禪師語錄 (Wumen Huikai Recorded Sayings)
witnesses_consulted.host: NDL Japan (local holding; exact Commons source page not yet re-confirmed)
witnesses_consulted.rights: Likely PD-old (NDL-to-Commons PD-Japan posture plus mechanical scan), but the rights memo is still marked incomplete in the local source ledger — downstream users should independently confirm before relying on this witness
witnesses_consulted.rights_basis_text: The witness README at C:\woodblocks\Wumen_Huikai_NDL_Commons\README.md explicitly records the validation pass as incomplete. The file is a recorded-sayings compilation attributed to Wumen Huikai, which puts its underlying work in the same PD-old bracket as the Wumenguan itself (Huikai died 1260). We cite this witness here as an editorial corroborant for Huikai's voice only, not as a primary authority for Wumenguan case wording.
witnesses_consulted.role_in_production: tertiary corroborant for Huikai's voice; rights-memo status incomplete
witnesses_consulted.waiver_note: Schema validation rule 4 in MANIFEST_SCHEMA.md §Validation normally requires vetting_confidence: high. This witness is explicitly waived to medium pending a cleaner rights memo. Its role is limited to corroboration, not base text; the base is ndl-1632 (high confidence).

witnesses_consulted.label: Editorial reading-edition markdown rebuild (the direct input to the converter)
witnesses_consulted.rights: Editor's own creative work; released under CC0 1.0 Universal as part of this OpenZenTexts text_id
witnesses_consulted.rights_basis_text: The reading-edition markdown is the editor's own editorial rebuild derived from the three PD witnesses above via OCR comparison, image adjudication, and manual repair. It is not under any license that propagates to this TEI file — the editor is the author and dedicates the work to the public domain.
witnesses_consulted.role_in_production: direct conversion input — the TEI body is generated line-for-line from this file

production_method: Deterministic markdown-to-TEI conversion via tools/woodblock-to-tei/convert-wumenguan-1632.mjs in this repository. Input: the editorial reading-edition markdown at C:\woodblocks\Transcriptions\Wumenguan_1632_NDL_Commons\architect\WUMENGUAN_1632_READING_EDITION.md (SHA-256 6ecc0b148d4cc82c1cf18b60c193d6c5be24298875140a89869fe67288c6e742, 30,903 bytes). Output: wumenguan-1632.xml in this directory. The converter emits <div type="preface"> + <div type="case" n="N"> (with nested <div type="gongan">, <div type="wumen-commentary">, <div type="verse">) + <div type="appendix"> for case 49 and back matter. Synthetic line IDs are minted in the "wm32.*" namespace, distinct from ws/gateless-barrier's "wm.*" namespace. The conversion is idempotent — same input bytes produce byte-identical output.
production_notes: Cases 1–48 form the core spine. Case 49 is placed in an appendix div so TM/search machinery that iterates the core sequence does not pull late-appended material into scope. Witness-backed rough readings (說道有門，無阿師分 in preface; 請續一向 in case 20; the case 31 無門曰 wording) are preserved verbatim — they are intentional editorial choices documented in C:\woodblocks\Transcriptions\Wumenguan_1632_NDL_Commons\architect\WUMENGUAN_1632_READING_EDITION_NOTES.md. Editorial repairs baked into the reading edition and preserved here: prefatory opening 佛語心為宗 restored; case 10 in received order 公案 → 無門曰 → 頌; case 17 coherence pass; cases 27 = 不是心佛 and 28 = 久響龍潭 (received order); case 31 no longer carries imported 龍潭 material; case 32 uses the 阿難乃佛弟子 / 劍刃上行 commentary+verse set. Apparatus / variant readings are deliberately NOT in this v1 — they can be added later as a <div type="apparatus"> derived from the separate working witness notes. This file is intentionally not a critical edition; a deeper reconciliation may eventually be published as ce.gateless-barrier per the reservation in the existing ws.gateless-barrier manifest. The "ndl-wumen-huikai-record" witness is included with vetting_confidence "medium" under an explicit waiver — see the per-witness waiver_note — because its rights memo is still marked incomplete in the local source ledger; it contributes corroboration only, not primary text.
